text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hic… So good!! Thank you for giving up your freedom, oh delicious fishies!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Why wouldn't I be?! I must show my gratitude 
to the great sea bream!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Every day they lay themselves down on 
a hot iron plate, never moving a muscle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There they lie, sacrificing their lives for us… 
Obviously we should show gratitude when 
consuming them!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wait, I thought taiyaki were just shaped like fish… You're telling me they're real?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wow… talk about cringe. 
I legit just figured that out.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We can't let their sacrifices be in vain! Now, promise you will appreciate the flavor of taiyaki!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Thank you, taiyaki! May your flavor continue to satisfy me for eons to come!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're the real GOAT here, taiyaki! We stan!
